page.title: Session record
page.subtitle: Consultation notes and observations
page.chargeHint: Generate a payment link for this session and send it to the patient.

panel.freePlaceholder: Write or record the session notes...
panel.micError: Microphone not available. Check your browser permissions.
panel.scribeHint: records the consult and organizes it into SOAP
panel.neuroIdHint: creates an ATM draft in the Assessment from the consult
panel.neuroIdSaved: ATM draft saved to the Assessment. Review it in the patient chart.
panel.zoomError: Could not bring the Zoom recording.
panel.consentIntro: Before recording: confirm the patient was informed and consented to this consultation being recorded and transcribed by AI.
panel.consentCheckbox: The patient consented to AI recording and transcription of this consultation.
panel.retentionNote: Audio is not stored: it is transcribed and discarded. Only the draft (SOAP/ATM) is kept in the chart for your review.

subjective.label: S — Subjective
subjective.placeholder: Complaints, symptoms and perceptions reported by the patient...

objective.label: O — Objective
objective.placeholder: Clinical findings: physical exam, vitals, tests applied...

assessment_note.label: A — Assessment
assessment_note.placeholder: Diagnostic hypothesis, clinical analysis, progress of the condition...

plan.label: P — Plan
plan.placeholder: Therapeutic plan, prescriptions, guidance, next steps...

panel.clinicalTestsHint: Names carry over from the last session so you can compare progress.
panel.noClinicalTests: No tests recorded in this session.
panel.bodyMapHint: Click the map to mark the points.
